Metadata.title: Sasha Elisabeth — Vaktherapie & Coaching
Metadata.description: Creative arts therapy and coaching for people who want to discover themselves and grow. Team building, individual coaching and coaching for women in the workplace.

teambuilding.title: Team Building Training
teambuilding.description: Team-building training for teams that want to collaborate better. Coaching through creative methods, from € 850 for groups of up to 12.

coaching.title: Individual Coaching Programmes
coaching.description: Individual coaching programmes of 5, 7 or 10 sessions. Gain insight, connection and lasting change through coaching and creative methods.

vrouwen.title: Coaching for Women in the Workplace
vrouwen.description: A coaching programme for women in the workplace: build confidence, position and communication skills at work.

hero.intro: My name is Sasha Elisabeth and I guide teams and individuals in making visible what's happening beneath the surface, and the patterns that move with it. Coaching and creative methods open up space for insight, connection and lasting growth.

teambuilding.label: Team Building
teambuilding.title: Building stronger teams through creative practice
bullets: Strengthen connection and collaboration within your team
Guided creative activities that encourage insight and teamwork
Practical tools and takeaways you can apply immediately
teambuilding.priceNote: Excluding VAT · Groups of up to 12 participants

coaching.label: Individual Coaching
coaching.title: Gain insight. Create lasting change.
bullets: Available through your employer or on your own initiative
Tailored coaching for personal and professional development
coaching.cardCta: Find the approach that suits you

vrouwen.label: Women in the Workplace
vrouwen.title: Building confidence in your role and career
bullets: Designed for organisations that want to support female employees
Focus on communication, boundaries, and professional presence

overMij.title: Working through experience, not just reflection.
overMij.intro: My name is Sasha Elisabeth. I support individuals and teams in creating insight, connection, and meaningful change.
overMij.training: As a qualified Art Therapist, I learned to look beyond words. Through coaching and creative methods, I help make visible what is happening beneath the surface, enabling people to recognise patterns, gain new perspectives, and move forward.
overMij.experience: Alongside my own practice, I work in addiction care and youth care, supporting people in complex and challenging situations. This experience shapes the way I work: with empathy, clarity, and without judgement.
overMij.drive: What drives me is witnessing the moment someone reconnects with themselves, when new possibilities emerge and lasting change begins.

contact.title: Our first conversation is always free of charge and without obligation.
contact.intro: Would you like to learn more or enquire about working together? Simply fill out the contact form, and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.process: We always begin with an online introductory call of up to one hour. During this conversation, we'll discuss your needs, expectations, and the practical details, while exploring together what best suits your situation.

ContactForm.serviceLabel: What would you like to get in touch about?
ContactForm.reasonPlaceholder: For example: a collaboration or a general question
ContactForm.errorGeneric: Sending failed. Please try again later
ContactForm.sentSubtitle: I'll get back to you as soon as possible.

ServicePage.ctaTitle: The first conversation is always without obligation.
ServicePage.comingSoonBody: Want to know more already? Feel free to get in touch.
